{

"judge_id": "judge_20231101",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flagged several claims that were not supported by evidence, such as the priority claim and logical tensions, but did not audit every load-bearing claim.",
    "R1.4": "The agent named prior works and articulated some deltas but did not map against the nearest 3-5 works comprehensively.",
    "R1.7": "The agent identified missing citations and flagged incorrect ones but did not audit every load-bearing citation thoroughly.",
    "RX.1": "The agent disclosed uncertainty for several claims, particularly regarding marginal vs conditional coverage and exchangeability assumptions, but could have been more systematic.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly stayed within scope with only one minor drift in discussing empirical coverage numbers without sufficient context.",
    "RX.4": "The output was harm-free but had minor regressions such as informal language and vague statements.",
    "RX.5": "The agent traced major rewrites but did not trace minor edits consistently."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.75,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.75
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flagged several claims that were not supported by evidence, such as the priority claim and logical tensions, but did not audit every load-bearing claim.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named prior works and articulated some deltas but did not map against the nearest 3-5 works comprehensively.
rationale.R1.7: The agent identified missing citations and flagged incorrect ones but did not audit every load-bearing citation thoroughly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainty for several claims, particularly regarding marginal vs conditional coverage and exchangeability assumptions, but could have been more systematic.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stayed within scope with only one minor drift in discussing empirical coverage numbers without sufficient context.
rationale.RX.4: The output was harm-free but had minor regressions such as informal language and vague statements.
rationale.RX.5: The agent traced major rewrites but did not trace minor edits consistently.
